action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline macro_f1 0.0099 after 3 epochs on 10% data, loss still high. Analysis: Need longer training on full data, better hyperparameters (class weights, label smoothing, AMP, warmup, cosine LR) to improve OOD generalization. Decision: Train CLIP ViT-B/16 on full data for 5 epochs (~3.4 hrs estimated), submit eval with best checkpoint. Use class weights (balanced, capped), label smoothing 0.1, lr=5e-5 with warmup, AMP, gradient clipping. This will give a stronger baseline within time budget, leaving ~4 hrs for further improvements.
